title: Kot Mumin Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Kot Mumin with a Z-Score of +3.29. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, reaching critical levels.
body:
The current heat wave in Kot Mumin has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating a critical situation. 
 The temperature is causing a significant increase in Cooling Degree Days (CDD), with a value of 10.5 GG, while the Humidity is at 57% and wind speed is 3.1 km/h. 
 The heat wave is expected to continue, with no relief in sight, and the city's infrastructure may be severely impacted.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the heat wave immediately.
